de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Interface ProblemLoaderControl

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener, ProgressMonitor
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl, AbstractUserInterfaceControl, ConsoleUserInterfaceControl, DefaultUserInterfaceControl, WindowUserInterfaceControl

    public interface ProblemLoaderControl
extends ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener, ProgressMonitor
    Allows to observe and control the loading performed by an AbstractProblemLoader.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.util.ProgressMonitor

        ProgressMonitor.Empty

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void loadingFinished(AbstractProblemLoader loader, IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer poContainer, ProofAggregate proofList, AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult result)
      The loading has stopped.
      void loadingStarted(AbstractProblemLoader loader)
      The loading has started.
      void reportWarnings(ImmutableSet<PositionedString> warnings)
      Report the occurred warnings.
      boolean selectProofObligation(InitConfig initConfig)
      This method is called if no IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer was created via AbstractProblemLoader.createProofObligationContainer() and can be overwritten for instance to open the proof management dialog as done by ProblemLoader.

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener

        progressStarted, progressStopped, proofCreated, reportException, reportStatus, reportStatus, resetStatus

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.util.ProgressMonitor

        setMaximum, setProgress

    • Method Detail

      • loadingStarted

        void loadingStarted(AbstractProblemLoader loader)
        The loading has started.
        Parameters:
        loader - The source AbstractProblemLoader.

      • loadingFinished

        void loadingFinished(AbstractProblemLoader loader,
                     IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer poContainer,
                     ProofAggregate proofList,
                     AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult result)
              throws ProblemLoaderException
        The loading has stopped.
        Parameters:
        loader - The source AbstractProblemLoader.
        poContainer - The loaded IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer.
        proofList - The created ProofAggregate.
        result - The occurred AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult.
        Throws:
        ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception.

      • selectProofObligation

        boolean selectProofObligation(InitConfig initConfig)
        This method is called if no IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer was created via AbstractProblemLoader.createProofObligationContainer() and can be overwritten for instance to open the proof management dialog as done by ProblemLoader.
        Returns:
        true if the proof obligation was selected, and false if action was aborted

      • reportWarnings

        void reportWarnings(ImmutableSet<PositionedString> warnings)
        Report the occurred warnings.
        Parameters:
        warnings - The occurred warnings.
